blocks.text: Bodø/Glimt dare to dream at San Siro — Norwegian history on the line
A stunning 3-1 first-leg advantage gives Norway's finest European club night a real foundation. Hold the line in Milan tonight and Glimt reach the last 16 — a feat no Norwegian club has managed.
🎮 13:00 — rain (Håvard Nygaard) suits up for MANA vs 100 Thieves, DraculaN S5

items: AS Monaco at Paris Saint-Germain — 21:00 (PSG lead 3-2, French derby on a knife's edge)
Benfica at Real Madrid — 21:00 (Real Madrid's narrow lead under siege in Lisbon)
